message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German Income and Expenditure Survey 1950","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10892","justification":"Directly measures income and expenditures of private households in Germany around 1950, fitting the topic of income and property/savings in the 1950s period."},{"title":"German Sample Survey of Income and Expenditure 1962/63","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10893","justification":"Household survey for Germany focused on income and expenditure; relevant for studying income, property and saving behavior in the early 1960s."},{"title":"German Sample Survey of Income and Expenditure 1969","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10894","justification":"National survey on household income and expenditures in Germany; covers the late 1960s with variables on earnings, consumption and assets."},{"title":"German Sample Survey of Income and Expenditure 1973","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10895","justification":"Provides microdata on German households’ income, expenditures and some forms of wealth/saving for the early 1970s."},{"title":"German Microcensus 1973","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10984","justification":"Large representative survey of Germany with detailed information on income from employment and other sources; suitable for income history in the 1970s."},{"title":"German Microcensus 1982","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11000","justification":"Includes labor market status and income variables for Germany in the early 1980s, relevant to historical income distribution analysis."},{"title":"German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 1980","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10940","justification":"Contains socio‑economic status information for West Germany including income categories and occasionally questions on savings, fitting 1980s historical income research."},{"title":"German Socio-Economic Panel (SOEP), 1984-2019","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.5684/soep-core.v36","justification":"Long-running panel of households in (West) Germany starting in 1984 with detailed measures of income, assets, property ownership, and saving behavior; highly suitable from mid‑1980s through 2000s."},{"title":"European Community Household Panel (ECHP), Germany 1994-2001","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12243","justification":"Contains harmonized microdata for Germany, including detailed income, employment and some wealth-related variables for the 1990s."},{"title":"Statistics on Income and Living Conditions (EU-SILC), Germany 2004","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12205","justification":"EU-based survey including Germany with detailed income components and some indicators of material deprivation and wealth for mid‑2000s historical comparison."}]}
